x4freetext: The angular distribution of 7Be and 13N recoils
from the 6Li(d,n) and 12C(d,n) reactions induced by 12
to 17 MeV deuterons were measured in coincidence.
50 mm2 in active area and 40 um in depletion depth.
Pulses from the recoil detector were counted in
coincidence with those from the neutron detector, a
4-in.-diam x 5-in. Pilot B plastic scintillator and
Amperex 58 AVP photomultiplier and in anticoincidence
with the thick silicon light particle detector, 700 um

The total estimated error in the

backward recoil angles was from 36% to 45%) .
